quick_assign_configuration_description: Manage the configuration that controls how newly registered patients are automatically assigned to the practitoners
quick_assign_enabled_description: Toggle this switch to enable or disable the quick assign feature
general_settings_description: Basic limits and retry settings for patient assignment
max_patients_per_staff_description: Maximum number of patients a practitioner can have in a day
window_size_description: Time span (in days) during which patient assignments are attempted.
retry_attempts_description: Number of times the system retries automated assignment
assignment_weights_description: Define how factors influence selecting the most suitable practitioner for a patient.
skill_weight_description: Prioritizes matching practitioner skills with patient care needs.
workload_weight_description: Prioritizes equal workload distribution among practitioners.
location_weight_description: Prioritizes practitioners located closer to the patient.
